allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Add dedicated layout for bubble widget to prevent black box

Created layout.tsx for /widget/bubble route that sets transparent
backgrounds on html/body at render time, eliminating the flash of
dark background that occurred when global CSS loaded before useEffect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Make bubble widget clickable and remove dark background

- Remove pointer-events:none from iframe \(was blocking clicks\)
- Increase iframe size to 400x700px \(room for expanded chat\)
- Add allowtransparency attribute to iframe
- Use CSS !important override for transparent background

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
